query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_claims,
  SUM(CASE WHEN damage_photos IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as claims_with_photos,
  SUM(CASE WHEN damage_photos IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as claims_without_photos
FROM claims;
command:

  COUNT(*) as total_claims,
  SUM(CASE WHEN damage_photos IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as claims_with_photos,
  SUM(CASE WHEN damage_photos IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as claims_without_photos
FROM claims;
